architecture.summary: SSE event protocol for activation tests. Backend emits prompt_result and done events. Frontend processes via useEffect cursor pattern in WorkspaceContext. resolvePrompts does sequential LLM calls. No architectural changes needed, just error propagation and progress events.

integrations.summary: N/A - all internal vskill components, no external service changes

ui-ux.summary: Errors display inline in results panel. Progress text below bar for classification. Inline hint below generate button when disabled. No toast notifications.

performance.summary: N/A - bug fixes only. Heartbeat every 3s during generation matches existing withHeartbeat pattern. No performance SLA changes.

security.summary: N/A - no auth, data, or permission changes. Bug fixes in existing activation test flow only.

edge-cases.summary: Error payloads in done events, missing frontmatter description fallback, silent spinner on backend errors. All edge cases are the bugs themselves.
